summary: Website project for CETA (College of Engineering Trivandrum Alumni) Galaxy Charitable Trust featuring a navbar, hero section, and footer with the CETA logo.
architectural_notes: Logo asset is CETA-2.png (circular emblem, dark red/maroon, globe and banner design)
Logo appears in three locations: navbar, hero section, and footer

existing_features.title: Save the uploaded CETA-2.png as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png and replace all broken CETA Galaxy logo image references in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file path, preserving all existing sizing, positioning, and styling of those logo elements exactly as they appear in Version 9.
